display.purpose: Scout wordmark and rare brand moments only.

body.purpose: Default UI copy; 65–75ch for long prose.

shadows.name: card-rest
shadows.purpose: Cards and default buttons at rest.

motion.name: ease-ui
motion.purpose: Default transition-colors on buttons and nav (150–250ms).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA: signal fill, ink label.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 36px; padding: 8px 16px; font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; color: #141416; background-color: #D4FB3C; border: none; border-radius: 10px; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px 0px hsl(240 5% 6% / 0.1); cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background-color: color-mix(in srgb, #D4FB3C 90%, #141416 10%); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px hsl(81 95% 61% / 0.45); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 36px; padding: 8px 16px; font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #141416; background-color: #EEEEE8; border: none; border-radius: 10px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0px hsl(240 5% 6% / 0.05); cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background-color: #E5E5E1; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px hsl(81 95% 61% / 0.45); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 36px; padding: 8px 16px; font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #141416; background: transparent; border: none; border-radius: 10px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background-color: rgba(224, 120, 86, 0.12); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px hsl(81 95% 61% / 0.45); }

components.name: Destructive Button
components.css: .ds-btn-destructive { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 36px; padding: 8px 16px; font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #FFFFFF; background-color: #D64545; border: none; border-radius: 10px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0px hsl(240 5% 6% / 0.05); cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-destructive:hover { background-color: rgba(214, 69, 69, 0.9); } .ds-btn-destructive:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px hsl(0 60% 55% / 0.5); }

components.name: Text Input
components.html: <input type="text" class="ds-input" placeholder="Client email" aria-label="Client email" />
components.css: .ds-input { display: flex; width: 100%; max-width: 320px; height: 36px; padding: 4px 12px; font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: #141416; background: transparent; border: 1px solid #E5E5E1; border-radius: 10px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0px hsl(240 5% 6% / 0.05); transition: border-color 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #6E6E75; } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: #D4FB3C; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px #D4FB3C; } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Card
components.html:
Clients

Your active roster at a glance.
components.css: .ds-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; padding: 24px; background: #FFFFFF; color: #141416; border: 1px solid #E5E5E1; border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px 0px hsl(240 5% 6% / 0.1); } .ds-card-title { font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.25; } .ds-card-desc { font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: #6E6E75; line-height: 1.5; margin: 0; }

components.name: Nav Link Active
components.description: Sidebar current page with signal tint and left bar.
components.css: .ds-nav-link { position: relative; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 10px 12px; font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #6E6E75; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 12px; transition: background-color 0.2s ease, color 0.2s ease; } .ds-nav-link:hover { background: rgba(238, 238, 232, 0.9); color: #141416; } .ds-nav-link--active { font-weight: 600; color: #141416; background: rgba(212, 251, 60, 0.14); } .ds-nav-bar { position: absolute; left: 0; top: 50%; width: 4px; height: 28px; transform: translateY(-50%); border-radius: 0 4px 4px 0; background: #D4FB3C; } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px hsl(81 95% 61% / 0.45); }

components.name: Success Alert
components.html: Got it. Your program is ready.
components.css: .ds-alert { padding: 12px 16px; font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.5; border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid transparent; } .ds-alert--success { color: #141416; background: rgba(46, 139, 87, 0.12); border-color: rgba(46, 139, 87, 0.35); }

narrative.overview:
Scout's interface should feel like a capable colleague on the gym floor: energetic enough to keep momentum, direct enough to respect a coach's time, warm enough to feel human. The visual system is restrained product UI on a paper-and-ink base: bone surfaces, fog neutrals, chartreuse signal for primary action, terracotta collar for secondary warmth. Density is practical (tables, forms, client records), not marketing-sparse.

This system explicitly rejects generic B2B SaaS and obvious AI UI grammar. Familiarity matters: buttons, inputs, and navigation should match what coaches expect from serious tools, with Scout's accent used sparingly so signal stays meaningful.
keyCharacteristics: Restrained color: signal and collar on actions and state, not decoration
Fixed rem type scale (Geist UI, Manrope for brand wordmark moments only)
Ink-tinted elevation, flat at rest, shadow on cards and hovers
shadcn/Radix component vocabulary with Scout token wiring
WCAG 2.1 AA contrast; focus rings use signal
State-rich controls: hover, focus, disabled, loading, error on every interactive pattern

rules.name: The Signal Rarity Rule
rules.body: Chartreuse signal appears on primary actions, focus, and current selection only. If more than ~10% of a screen reads as signal, the accent has lost meaning.

rules.name: The Ink-on-Signal Rule
rules.body: Primary buttons and sidebar primary use ink foreground on signal background. White on chartreuse fails contrast and reads as generic SaaS.

rules.name: The Sans Default Rule
rules.body: Headings in app screens use Geist, not Manrope. Manrope is for brand presence, not interface hierarchy.

rules.name: The Fixed Scale Rule
rules.body: Product UI uses fixed rem steps from the token file, not fluid clamp headings.

rules.name: The Flat-Until-State Rule
rules.body: Do not add shadow to static list rows or plain sections. Shadow signals interactivity (card, button, overlay), not structure.

rules.name: The No-Glass Rule
rules.body: Backdrop blur and glassmorphism are forbidden unless a one-off experiment is explicitly approved.

dos: Do use bg-primary / text-primary-foreground for primary CTAs (signal + ink).
Do use Geist for all in-app headings, labels, and body; Manrope only for Scout brand moments.
Do use font-mono for workout numbers, metrics, and tabular data.
Do keep empty states encouraging with a clear verb+object CTA.
Do show job progress with steps for async AI work.
Do use design-system shadows with ink tint, not pure black gray.
Do meet WCAG 2.1 AA for body text and focus visibility on signal ring.
donts: Don't use generic B2B SaaS patterns: navy-and-purple gradients, hero-metric dashboards, identical icon-card grids, sterile No data copy, buzzwords.
Don't use obvious AI UI: gradient text, glassmorphism-by-default, uppercase eyebrow kickers on every section, numbered section scaffolding without real sequence.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as colored accents on cards, list items, or alerts (nav wayfinding bar excepted).
Don't put Manrope on buttons, table cells, or form labels.
Don't fill large background areas with signal or collar.
Don't use white text on signal or unpaired color for state.
Don't nest cards or default to card grids when a simple list or table is clearer.
